location: Guaranteed drop from the Draconic Tree Sentinel boss, fought at Capital Rampart on the road into Leyndell from the Outer Wall Battleground grace.
tactics: A mounted golden knight wielding lightning magic and a huge lance; its horse charges are the most dangerous attack — stay to its side or rear to avoid being run down.
It's optional — you can run past it to reach Leyndell — but killing it also drops the Dragon Greatclaw curved sword and Malformed Dragon armor set alongside this shield.
Most of its magic damage is lightning-based, so lightning resistance gear helps if you're struggling.
lore: Whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon and imbued with lightning, carried by the grotesque Tree Sentinels who still serve the Erdtree.

builds.name: Anti-dragon Strength/Dex build
builds.why: Deals bonus damage (+30% vs dragons, +15% vs ancient dragons) when used as a weapon, useful against Farum Azula's dragon roster and other named dragons.
